s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 AIR DUCT SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Release the 2 claws and remove the No. 2 air duct sub-assembly as shown in the illustration.
Disconnect the connector.
Remove the 2 screws and blower assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 6 HEATER TO REGISTER DUCT ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Release the 4 claws and remove the No. 6 heater to register duct assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE DRAIN COOLER HOSE (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the drain cooler hose from the air conditioning radiator assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE AIR OUTLET CONTROL SERVO MOTOR (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the 2 connectors and remove the air conditioner harness.
Remove the 3 screws and then remove the air outlet control servo motor.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE AIR MIX CONTROL SERVO MOTOR (for Automatic Air Conditioning System)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws and air mix control servo motor.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE HEATER RADIATOR UNIT SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the screw and clamp.
Release the 4 claws and remove the clamp.
Remove the heater radiator unit sub-assembly from the air conditioning radiator assembly.

atten3.ptxt: Prepare a drain pan or cloth in case the cooling water leaks.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COOLER EXPANSION VALVE (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Using a 4 mm hexagon wrench, remove the 2 hexagon bolts and cooler expansion valve.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 COOLER EVAPORATOR SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 6 screws, release the 4 claws, and remove the plate cover.
Remove the clamp and No. 1 cooler thermistor.
Remove the No. 1 cooler evaporator sub-assembly.
Remove the 2 O-rings from the No. 1 cooler evaporator sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 AIR DUCT SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Release the 2 claws and remove the No. 2 air duct sub-assembly as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COOLER EXPANSION VALVE (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Using a 4 mm hexagon wrench, remove the 2 hexagon bolts and cooler expansion valve.
Remove the connector and clamp, and disconnect the wire harness.
Remove the 6 screws and then the blower assembly with the cooler evaporator sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 6 HEATER TO REGISTER DUCT ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Release the 4 claws and remove the No. 6 heater to register duct assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE DRAIN COOLER HOSE (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the drain cooler hose from the air conditioning radiator assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE AIR OUTLET CONTROL SERVO MOTOR (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the 2 connectors and remove the air conditioner harness.
Remove the 3 screws and then the air outlet control servo motor.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE HEATER RADIATOR UNIT SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the screw and clamp.
Release the 4 claws and remove the clamp.
Remove the heater radiator unit sub-assembly from the air conditioning radiator assembly.

atten3.ptxt: Prepare a drain pan or cloth in case the cooling water leaks.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 COOLER EVAPORATOR SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the clamp and No. 1 cooler thermistor.
Remove the No. 1 cooler evaporator sub-assembly.
Remove the 2 O-rings from the No. 1 cooler evaporator sub-assembly.
